prose:
**Aniline frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from a frontier-orbitals single-point calculation. Method used: DFT tier `standard` = **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** in **PySCF** (functional `b3lyp`, basis `def2-tzvp`; no density-fitting flag was used). Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` (14 atoms), not re-optimized in this task. Environment: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`). Charge 0, multiplicity 1. SCF converged: true, in 9 cycles. Software version was not reported by the tool.

Headline value: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV**.

Orbital energies returned by chemkit: HOMO = -5.553772 eV; LUMO = -0.2489544 eV. The tool also returned Koopmans-style values: vertical IP = 5.553772 eV and vertical EA = 0.2489544 eV.

Integrity verdict: `integrity.trustworthy = true`.

Warnings: no `warnings` array was present in the tool result, so no tool warnings were reported.

Reproducibility: input file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`; CLI invocation returned by the tool: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp6dvqc2tn/live.json`. The chemkit result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot honestly report one.
